title: Babel Transform Executor Schema
description: Transform JavaScript/TypeScript files using Babel with configurable presets

babelConfigPath.description: Path to Babel config file relative to project root (e.g., './build/gulp/transpile-config.js')

configKey.description: Key in the config object to use (e.g., 'cjs', 'tsCjs', 'esm')

sourcePattern.description: Primary glob pattern for source files to transform (e.g., './js/**/*.js')

excludePatterns.description: Glob patterns to exclude from processing

outDir.description: Output directory relative to project root where transformed files will be written

removeDebug.description: Remove #DEBUG...#ENDDEBUG blocks before transpilation (for production builds)

renameExtensions.description: Map of file extension renames to apply to output files

copyAssets.description: Additional asset files or directories to copy verbatim into outDir after transformation

from.description: Source path relative to project root. Can be a file or directory.
